name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 瓜瓜
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. These berettas have been custom painted with a twisted, frightening depiction of a watermelon over a navy blue background. Sweet dreams...
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 这把双持贝瑞塔采用扭曲且骇人的自定义涂装，在海军蓝的背景上绘制了西瓜。 美梦……
